story.text: Promote every gate from a one-time judgment point into a governed routing surface (a gateway): guard policy (who may approach, what evidence required, what verbs allowed, what capacity budget, what refusal routes) + the gate judgment (accept/refuse/amend/halt, receipt required) + a discharge route (derive next event, summon repair node, aggregate into slice, escalate to owner, or dead-letter). Turns accept/refuse into 'may this actor move this work across this seam, under this policy, at this capacity, with this audit trail, and what route happens next.' Value: each seam becomes auditable and capacity-aware, not just a yes/no.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
